scripts.backfill:all: pnpm run backfill:daily && pnpm run backfill:weekly && pnpm run backfill:period
scripts.backfill:all:wait: pnpm run backfill:daily:wait && pnpm run backfill:weekly:wait && pnpm run backfill:period:wait
scripts.reindex:archived-files: dotenvx run -fk ../.env.keys -f .env --overload -- node scripts/repair-d1-indexes-from-r2.mjs --remote --db dev-kc-battle-index --bucket dev-kc-battle-data --phase d1-reindex
scripts.reindex:archived-files:apply: dotenvx run -fk ../.env.keys -f .env --overload -- node scripts/repair-d1-indexes-from-r2.mjs --remote --db dev-kc-battle-index --bucket dev-kc-battle-data --phase d1-reindex --apply
scripts.bootstrap:archived-files: dotenvx run -fk ../.env.keys -f .env --overload -- node scripts/repair-d1-indexes-from-r2.mjs --remote --db dev-kc-battle-index --bucket dev-kc-battle-data --phase d1-bootstrap-archived-files
scripts.bootstrap:archived-files:apply: dotenvx run -fk ../.env.keys -f .env --overload -- node scripts/repair-d1-indexes-from-r2.mjs --remote --db dev-kc-battle-index --bucket dev-kc-battle-data --phase d1-bootstrap-archived-files --apply
scripts.reindex:block-indexes: dotenvx run -fk ../.env.keys -f .env --overload -- node scripts/repair-d1-indexes-from-r2.mjs --remote --db dev-kc-battle-index --bucket dev-kc-battle-data --phase d1-backfill-indexes
scripts.reindex:block-indexes:apply: dotenvx run -fk ../.env.keys -f .env --overload -- node scripts/repair-d1-indexes-from-r2.mjs --remote --db dev-kc-battle-index --bucket dev-kc-battle-data --phase d1-backfill-indexes --apply
scripts.reindex:all: pnpm run reindex:archived-files && pnpm run reindex:block-indexes
scripts.reindex:all:apply: pnpm run reindex:archived-files:apply && pnpm run reindex:block-indexes:apply
scripts.battle-data:recover: pnpm run bootstrap:archived-files && pnpm run reindex:all
scripts.battle-data:recover:apply: pnpm run bootstrap:archived-files:apply && pnpm run reindex:all:apply
scripts.battle-data:verify: dotenvx run -fk ../.env.keys -f .env --overload -- node scripts/repair-d1-indexes-from-r2.mjs --remote --db dev-kc-battle-index --bucket dev-kc-battle-data --phase d1-verify
